title: Uphill climbing repeats (outdoor)
terrain: sustained climb, walk down between reps and after - no bike/treadmill available

steps.target: Z3-Z4, hard hike or power-hike, poles if you have them

coachNotes: Replaces the usual treadmill-incline tempo since there's no treadmill or bike here. Real climbing is more race-specific anyway. The rule doesn't change: walk every descent today, don't run any of it.
